zh.lifeSummary: Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon是Gilbert de Brionne comte d'Eu et de Brionne和Gunnora d' Aunou的兒子，於大約1039年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利艾。他於大約1050年與Alberade d'Avranches在法國諾門迪盧沙吉尼凱結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1091年1月1日在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon是Gilbert de Brionne comte d'Eu et de Brionne和Gunnora d' Aunou的儿子，于大约1039年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利艾。他于大约1050年与Alberade d'Avranches在法国諾門迪盧沙吉尼凱结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1091年1月1日在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文奧可哈普頓。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

Catalan: habitational name from any of various minor places called Moles, from the plural of mola (see Mola ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulles (Calvados). See also   Moyles  .

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the Middle Ages it was a comparatively common name, which gave rise to a surname. It was borne by the Norman crusader Baldwin of Boulogne, who in 1100 was elected first king of Jerusalem, and by four further crusader kings of Jerusalem. It continued to be used by some families in England into the 17th century, but in modern times it normally represents a transferred use of the surname rather than a direct revival of the Norman given name.

en.lifeSummary: Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon was born about 1039, in Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France as the son of Gilbert de Brionne comte d'Eu et de Brionne and Gunnora d' Aunou. He married Alberade d'Avranches about 1050, in Saint-Nicaise, Rouen, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 January 1091, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon est né environ 1039, à Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, fils de Gilbert de Brionne comte d'Eu et de Brionne et Gunnora d' Aunou. Il a épousé Alberade d'Avranches environ 1050, à Saint-Nicaise, Rouen, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1091, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon wurde um 1039 in Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Gilbert de Brionne comte d'Eu et de Brionne und Gunnora d' Aunou geboren. Er hat um 1050 in Saint-Nicaise, Rouen, Normandie, Frankreich Alberade d'Avranches geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Januar 1091 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon è nato il circa 1039 nel Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia come figlio di Gilbert de Brionne comte d'Eu et de Brionne e Gunnora d' Aunou. Lui sposato Alberade d'Avranches circa 1050, nel Saint-Nicaise, Rouen, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 gennaio 1091, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Okehampton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devonは約1039年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエウでGilbert de Brionne comte d'Eu et de BrionneとGunnora d' Aunouの息子として生まれた。約1050年にフランスノーマンディロウンサイント-ニケイゼでAlberade d'Avranchesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1091年1月1日に故郷で53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンオケハンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon(은)는 대략 1039년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 우에서 Gilbert de Brionne comte d'Eu et de Brionne(와)과 Gunnora d' Aunou의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1050년 프랑스 노먼디 루언 세인트-니카이스에서 Alberade d'Avranches(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1091년 1월 1일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오케함프턴에 묻혔다.

mn.All Saints Churchyard, Okehampton, West: Okehampton, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Okehampton, Devonshire, England: Okehampton, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon nasceu aproximadamente 1039, em Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França filho de Gilbert de Brionne comte d'Eu et de Brionne e Gunnora d' Aunou. Ele casou-se com Alberade d'Avranches aproximadamente 1050, em Saint-Nicaise, Rouen, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1091, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon родился около 1039 г. в местности эу, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция. Его родителей звали Gilbert de Brionne comte d'Eu et de Brionne и Gunnora d' Aunou. Он женился на женщине по имени Alberade d'Avranches около 1050 г. в местности сеинт-никеис, роуен, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 января 1091 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Baldwin FitzGilbert de Meules , Visc of Devon nació aproximadamente 1039, en Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia como hijo de Gilbert de Brionne comte d'Eu et de Brionne y Gunnora d' Aunou. Se casó con Alberade d'Avranches aproximadamente 1050, en Saint-Nicaise, Rouen, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de enero de 1091, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
